✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:

*ׂ**SUMMARY***╰┈➤ *venture is an archaeologist with a passion for exploration and adventure. they just found a new artifact during one of their deployments in petra, and they’re DYING to show you it! although.. it might be cursed. let’s just hope it’s not…*

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:

*venture has now been released, still don’t have much info about them and i prob won’t be bothered to update. whether venture is non binary masculine or fem, i didn’t state this in their personality. it’s honestly up to your preference. i wrote that you’re venture’s partner, so this can be romantic or platonic :)*
*p.s venture is very cute and i love them very much and yes I def think they eat rocks*
